name: @memstead/client
description: Browser client wrapping @memstead/wasm + the memstead-bridge HTTP/SSE surface as a single VaultSyncClient class.

_peerDependencies_pending_publish._note: Lifted to a proper `peerDependencies` entry once @memstead/wasm is published to the registry. Today the WASM crate is built locally via wasm-pack and consumers wire it through `engineFactory`. The client's TS surface only references the WasmEngineLike interface (src/types.ts) — no module-level import of @memstead/wasm exists, so this gap does not affect compilation or tests.
